name: Pacific Rim Brochettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently press tofu between kitchen towels to remove excess water. Slice into pieces 2-inch X 1-inch X 1/2".
2. Cut each chunk crosswise and set aside. Slice and discard all but the bottom 3 inches of lemon grass.
3. With a wooden mallet, pound the base of the lemon grass to release the aromatic oils.
4. In a food processor, combine the lemon grass with mint, ginger, garlic, pepper, cilantro stems, and green onions. Process in short bursts for 30 seconds.
5. Add the remaining ingredients and process for 1 minute. Transfer to a glass container and add the tofu pieces. Cover and marinate for 4 to 6 hours.
6. Prepare the grill. Trim the green onions to 2-inch pieces.
7. Place vegetables and tofu on skewers, alternating for color. Group snow peas in threes so they don't cook too quickly.
8. Place skewers on hot grill and brush with remaining marinade.
9. Grill, turning once until the vegetables are tender. This should take about 5 minutes or so.
10. Garnish with cilantro and serve.
PER SERVING: 258 Cal.; 18g Prot.; 9g Fat; 26g Carb.; 0 Chol.; 333mg Sod.; 5g Fiber.
